trivia_bullets.text: Broken Wings is a reprint with 10 prior printings. Original printing was Zendikar Rising (ZNR, September 2020). Subsequent reprints include Kaldheim (KHM), Streets of New Capenna (SNC), Dominaria United (DMU), Game Night: Free-for-All (GN3), Commander Masters (CMM), Bloomburrow Commander (BLC), The List (PLST KHM-164), Foundations (FDN), and now Aetherdrift (DFT, February 2025). Each new printing brings fresh art from the set's artist. [Scryfall: reprint: true, prints_search_uri results]

Broken Wings destroys target artifact, enchantment, or creature with flying for 3 mana (2G) — a flexible green hate-card that catches three distinct threat categories in one effect. EDHREC rank 3,893 — the highest-ranked card in this wave's batch by far, indicating meaningful Commander inclusion. Its reprint frequency (10 printings across 5 years) signals Wizards treats it as a format staple worth keeping accessible. [Scryfall: edhrec_rank 3893, reprint: true]

Flavor text (DFT printing): "An early lead puts a target on your back." — No named speaker. The line reframes the card's effect in the Aetherdrift racing context: the flying creature being destroyed is the race leader, shot down by rivals. This is new DFT-specific flavor text matching the racing set's narrative. [Scryfall: flavor_text field]

related_cards.name: Naturalize
related_cards.note: The classic 2-mana destroy artifact/enchantment — Broken Wings adds the flying-creature clause for 1 more mana

related_cards.name: Force of Vigor
related_cards.note: A pushed artifact/enchantment hate card in the same design space; often compared when evaluating Broken Wings's slot

related_cards.name: Return to Nature
related_cards.note: Same CMC, same three-clause flexible hate — the most direct functional parallel
